findings.description: Three sections contain only the placeholder text 'なし' (3 characters), which is well below the 50-character threshold. s2 captures the `.. _convert_property:` anchor, s4 captures the 入力値のトリム heading (no RST anchor present in source), and s7 captures the `.. _validation-message-creation:` anchor.
findings.source_evidence: Source has RST anchors `.. _convert_property:` and `.. _validation-message-creation:`, plus the heading '入力値のトリム' with no preceding anchor.

findings.description: The hint `ValidationUtil` is absent from s3 hints, but the section content explicitly references `ValidationUtil.validateAndConvertRequest` in both prose and the code example.
The hint `ValidationContext` is absent from s6 hints, but the section code example uses `ValidationContext<UserEntity>` as the return type of `validateAndConvertRequest`.
